scripts.dev:all: bunx concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n api,web,admin -c cyan,magenta,green "bun run dev:api" "bun run dev:web" "bun run dev:admin"
scripts.test:all: bunx concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n api,web,admin -c cyan,magenta,green "bun run test:api" "bun run test:web" "bun run test:admin"
scripts.test:e2e:all: bun run test:e2e:web && bun run test:e2e:admin
scripts.test:ci: bun run db:check && bun run typecheck:all && bun run test:api && bun run test:web && bun run test:admin
scripts.typecheck:all: bun run typecheck:packages && bun run typecheck:api && bun run typecheck:web && bun run typecheck:admin
